workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence, and normalize to per-upload units.

reasons: left timed sample count 7 is below claim floor 15
right timed sample count 7 is below claim floor 15

p95Percent=-101.842152 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p99Percent=-101.842152 is not positive (positive means left faster)
